sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52445" key="kakta/menai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κακτάμεναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάκτανε</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάκτεινε</orth>, <sense id="n52445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατακτείνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
